blocks.code:
(define (collatz n)
  (if (= n 1)
      (list 1)
      (if (= (modulo n 2) 0)
          (append (list n) (collatz (floor (/ n 2))))
          (append (list n) (collatz (+ (* 3 n) 1))))))
(define path (collatz 27))
(list (list "length" (length path))
      (list "peak" (reduce (lambda (a b) (if (> a b) a b)) path))
      (list "first-15" (take path 15)))

(define (collatz n)
  (if (= n 1)
      (list 1)
      (if (= (modulo n 2) 0)
          (append (list n) (collatz (floor (/ n 2))))
          (append (list n) (collatz (+ (* 3 n) 1))))))
(define path (collatz 27))
(list (list "length" (length path))
      (list "peak" (reduce (lambda (a b) (if (> a b) a b)) path))
      (list "first-15" (take path 15)))
